name: Ankit
meaning: One with good conduct, noble qualities, and auspicious traits.
meaning_hi: अच्छे आचरण वाला, अच्छे गुणों वाला,शुभ लक्षणों से युक्त।
meaning_en: One with good conduct, noble qualities, and auspicious traits.

name: Akhilesh
meaning: A leader of all, a master, and one with good intellect.
meaning_hi: सब के बोस,मालिक, अच्छी बुद्धि वाला
meaning_en: A leader of all, a master, and one with good intellect.

name: Ajay
meaning: Invincible, strong, and intelligent.
meaning_hi: जिसे कोई जीत नहीं सकता, बलवान, बुद्धिमान
meaning_en: Invincible, strong, and intelligent.

name: Ajit
meaning: Invincible, highly knowledgeable, and powerful.
meaning_hi: जिसे कोई जीत नहीं सकता, सबसे ज्यादा ज्ञानी, शक्तिशाली
meaning_en: Invincible, highly knowledgeable, and powerful.

name: Atalavihaaree
meaning: Serious by nature, yet able to bring measured joy.
meaning_hi: गंभीर रहनेवाला, ठीक ठीक मनोरंजन करने वाला
meaning_en: Serious by nature, yet able to bring measured joy.

name: Anil
meaning: A benevolent person who gives life and helps others.
meaning_hi: दूसरे को जीवन दान करने वाला, परोपकारी इन्सान
meaning_en: A benevolent person who gives life and helps others.

name: Aneesh
meaning: Foremost, supreme, and seated in the highest place.
meaning_hi: सबसे प्रमुख, सर्वोच्च पद पर आसीन
meaning_en: Foremost, supreme, and seated in the highest place.

name: Anuj
meaning: A younger sibling, born later, and loved by all.
meaning_hi: भाई-बहनों में छोटे।बाद में जन्म लेने वाले,सबके प्रिय।
meaning_en: A younger sibling, born later, and loved by all.

name: Anubhav
meaning: Experienced and wise through personal observation and practice.
meaning_hi: अनुभवी,ज्ञानी,व्यक्तिगत निरीक्षण और प्रयोग से प्राप्त ज्ञान वाले।
meaning_en: Experienced and wise through personal observation and practice.

name: Abhay
meaning: Fearless and powerful.
meaning_hi: निडर, शक्तिमान
meaning_en: Fearless and powerful.

name: Abhishek
meaning: Pure in conduct, like sacred water.
meaning_hi: पवित्र जल के जैसे शुद्ध पवित्र आचरण वाले
meaning_en: Pure in conduct, like sacred water.

name: Abhyuday
meaning: Hardworking and dedicated to worldly progress.
meaning_hi: सांसारिक उन्नति करने वाले, मेहनती, पुरुषार्थी
meaning_en: Hardworking and dedicated to worldly progress.

name: Amarendr
meaning: A beloved devotee of the immortal Lord.
meaning_hi: जिसका मालिक अमर है वह, भगवान के प्रिय भक्त
meaning_en: A beloved devotee of the immortal Lord.

name: Amit
meaning: Large-hearted and full of limitless potential.
meaning_hi: विशाल दिल वाले,असीम क्षमता वाले
meaning_en: Large-hearted and full of limitless potential.

name: Amitaabh
meaning: Highly radiant and energetic.
meaning_hi: अधिक तेजस्वी, ओजस्वी
meaning_en: Highly radiant and energetic.

name: Aravind
meaning: One who attains the company of wise and noble people.
meaning_hi: ज्ञानी महापुरुषों को प्राप्त करने वाला
meaning_en: One who attains the company of wise and noble people.

name: Arush
meaning: Loving toward everyone, slow to anger, and free from needless harm.
meaning_hi: जल्दी से किसी से नाराज न होने वाले,क्रोध, विना मतलब के हिंसा न करने वाले,सबसे प्रेम करने वाले।
meaning_en: Loving toward everyone, slow to anger, and free from needless harm.

name: Arjun
meaning: A courageous achiever of wealth, like the heroic son of Kunti.
meaning_hi: धन संपत्ति कमाने वाला, कुन्ती पुत्र के समान पराक्रमी, गौर वर्ण वाला
meaning_en: A courageous achiever of wealth, like the heroic son of Kunti.

name: Arpan
meaning: Generous by nature; one who likes to give.
meaning_hi: दानी, कुछ न कुछ गिफ्ट देने के स्वभाववाला
meaning_en: Generous by nature; one who likes to give.

name: Avadhesh
meaning: Possessing qualities like King Dasharatha of Ayodhya; skilled, wise, and loving toward all.
meaning_hi: अयोध्या के राजा दशरथ के जैसे गुण वाले,राजनीति विशेषज्ञ,सभी से प्रेम करने वाले।
meaning_en: Possessing qualities like King Dasharatha of Ayodhya; skilled, wise, and loving toward all.

name: Ashok
meaning: Free from sorrow and carefree in spirit.
meaning_hi: जिसके पास कोई शोक नहीं, बिंदास रहने वाला
meaning_en: Free from sorrow and carefree in spirit.

name: Ashvin
meaning: Fortunate, associated with horses, healing, and the Ashwini nakshatra.
meaning_hi: घोड़ा फार्म के मालिक,घुड़ सवार करने वाले,देवताओं के वेद्य,जिनका जन्म अश्विनी नक्षत्र में हुआ हो सौभाग्यशाली,
meaning_en: Fortunate, associated with horses, healing, and the Ashwini nakshatra.

name: Aanvikaanvik
meaning: A lover of physics, matter, and atomic science.
meaning_hi: पदार्थ विज्ञान में विशेषज्ञ, भौतिकी प्रेमी, परमाणु विज्ञान प्रेमी।
meaning_en: A lover of physics, matter, and atomic science.

name: Aakarsh
meaning: Attractive, beautiful, knowledgeable, and powerful.
meaning_hi: सबको अपनी ओर आकर्षित करने वाला, सुंदर,ज्ञानवान, शक्तिमान
meaning_en: Attractive, beautiful, knowledgeable, and powerful.

name: Aakaash
meaning: A famous person who gains recognition everywhere.
meaning_hi: सब जगह से ख्याति प्राप्त करने वाला , प्रसिद्ध व्यक्ति
meaning_en: A famous person who gains recognition everywhere.

name: Aatmaanand
meaning: One who lives joyfully and remains cheerful within himself.
meaning_hi: अपने आप में आनंद रहने वाला,मौज मस्ती में रहने वाला
meaning_en: One who lives joyfully and remains cheerful within himself.

name: Aatmaaraam
meaning: One who lives joyfully and remains cheerful within himself.
meaning_hi: अपने आप में आनंद रहने वाला,मौज मस्ती में रहने वाला
meaning_en: One who lives joyfully and remains cheerful within himself.

name: Aadarsh
meaning: A thoughtful person who acts with care and guides others.
meaning_hi: अच्छी तरह से देखकर विचारकर कार्य करने वाला व्यक्ति,लोगों के लिए पथ-प्रदर्शक।
meaning_en: A thoughtful person who acts with care and guides others.

name: Aadity
meaning: Radiant and bright like the sun; divine in nature.
meaning_hi: सूर्य के जैसे प्रकाशित, तेजस्वी,देव तुल्य
meaning_en: Radiant and bright like the sun; divine in nature.

name: Aadityanaath
meaning: A worshipper of the sun; lord of those who help others like the sun.
meaning_hi: सूर्य भगवान् के उपासक, सूर्य जैसे परोकार करने वालों का स्वामी
meaning_en: A worshipper of the sun; lord of those who help others like the sun.

name: Aadityapaal
meaning: A protector of the sun's light; scientific and radiant.
meaning_hi: सूर्य के प्रकाश की रक्षा करने वाला वैज्ञानिक
meaning_en: A protector of the sun's light; scientific and radiant.

name: Aadityaprakaash
meaning: Energetic and radiant like sunlight.
meaning_hi: सूर्य के प्रकाश के जैसे ओजस्वी तेजस्वी
meaning_en: Energetic and radiant like sunlight.

name: Aanand
meaning: Cheerful, pleasant, and joyful.
meaning_hi: खुश मिजाज, प्रसन्न रहनेवाला, आनंद में रहने वाला
meaning_en: Cheerful, pleasant, and joyful.

name: Aanandaprakaash
meaning: One who enlightens others through his joy.
meaning_hi: अपने आनंद से सबको प्रकाशित करने वाले
meaning_en: One who enlightens others through his joy.

name: Aarjav
meaning: Honest, clear-spoken, generous-hearted, and good-natured.
meaning_hi: ईमानदारी, स्पष्टवादी,उदार हृदय वाले, अच्छा स्वभाव वाला
meaning_en: Honest, clear-spoken, generous-hearted, and good-natured.

name: Aaryaprataap
meaning: A noble person with excellent qualities and conduct.
meaning_hi: श्रेष्ठ गुण, श्रेष्ठ आचरण से युक्त महापुरुष
meaning_en: A noble person with excellent qualities and conduct.

name: Aarshey
meaning: A child of sages; philosophical like a rishi.
meaning_hi: ऋषि के संतान , ऋषि मुनि जैसे दार्शनिक
meaning_en: A child of sages; philosophical like a rishi.

name: Aalimpan
meaning: Hardworking and fully dedicated to achieving his goal.
meaning_hi: अपने लक्ष्य को पाने के लिये अच्छी तरह से लगे रहने वाला,मेहनती,पुरुषार्थी
meaning_en: Hardworking and fully dedicated to achieving his goal.

name: Aashutosh
meaning: A devotee of Lord Shiva who is easily pleased and content.
meaning_hi: भगवान शिव का वह भक्त जो जल्दी प्रसन्न हो जाता है और संतुष्ट रहता है।
meaning_en: A devotee of Lord Shiva who is easily pleased and content.

name: Ikshvaaku
meaning: One who fulfills his wishes and achieves his goals.
meaning_hi: अपनी इच्छा को पूरा करने वाला, अपने लक्ष्य को हासिल करने वाले
meaning_en: One who fulfills his wishes and achieves his goals.

name: Indr
meaning: Supremely prosperous and powerful.
meaning_hi: परम् ऐश्वर्यशाली, सामर्थ्यवान
meaning_en: Supremely prosperous and powerful.

name: Indrajit
meaning: Powerful enough to aspire to defeat even Indra, king of the gods.
meaning_hi: इन्द्र जैसे देवराज को भी जीतने की इच्छा रखने वाले, सामर्थ्यवान
meaning_en: Powerful enough to aspire to defeat even Indra, king of the gods.

name: Indradev
meaning: One who follows Indra as an ideal and shares his strength.
meaning_hi: देवराज इन्द्र को आदर्श मानने वाले,उनके जैसे सामर्थ्यवान
meaning_en: One who follows Indra as an ideal and shares his strength.

name: Indramani
meaning: A devotee of Lord Indra, powerful like him.
meaning_hi: इन्द्र भगवान के भक्त,उनके जैसे सामर्थ्यवान
meaning_en: A devotee of Lord Indra, powerful like him.

name: Indramitr
meaning: A powerful friend, like Indra the king.
meaning_hi: इन्द्रराज के जैसे सामर्थ्यवान मित्र वाले, सामर्थ्यवान
meaning_en: A powerful friend, like Indra the king.

name: Indraraaj
meaning: One who honors Indra as king and shares his strength.
meaning_hi: देवराज इन्द्र को राजा मानने वाले, उनके जैसे सामर्थ्यवान
meaning_en: One who honors Indra as king and shares his strength.

name: Indraabh
meaning: Possessing radiance, vigor, and courage like Indra.
meaning_hi: इन्द्र के जैसे ओज तेज और पराक्रम वाला
meaning_en: Possessing radiance, vigor, and courage like Indra.

name: Indresh
meaning: One who follows Indra as an ideal and shares his strength.
meaning_hi: देवराज इन्द्र को आदर्श मानने वाले,उनके जैसे सामर्थ्यवान
meaning_en: One who follows Indra as an ideal and shares his strength.

name: Indhaan
meaning: Radiant, energetic, and powerful.
meaning_hi: ओजस्वी तेजस्वी शक्तिशाली
meaning_en: Radiant, energetic, and powerful.

name: Ilesh
meaning: A ruler on earth, kingly and devoted.
meaning_hi: पृथ्वी पर राज करने वाले,राजा, गोभक्त
meaning_en: A ruler on earth, kingly and devoted.

name: Ishesh
meaning: Strong and powerful.
meaning_hi: बलशाली, शक्तिशाली,
meaning_en: Strong and powerful.

name: Isht
meaning: Beloved by all, dear, and wise.
meaning_hi: सबके प्यारे,दुलारे,ज्ञानी
meaning_en: Beloved by all, dear, and wise.

name: Ukshan
meaning: Strong and powerful like a bull.
meaning_hi: बैल के जैसे बलशाली शक्तिशाली
meaning_en: Strong and powerful like a bull.

name: Ugrasen
meaning: A fierce king ready for battle and national protection.
meaning_hi: उग्र, युद्ध के लिए या राष्ट्र रक्षा के लिए तत्पर सेना वाले राजा
meaning_en: A fierce king ready for battle and national protection.

name: Ujjval
meaning: Radiant and bright-faced.
meaning_hi: ओजस्वी तेजस्वी मुखमंडल वाले
meaning_en: Radiant and bright-faced.

name: Uttam
meaning: A superior person with good qualities.
meaning_hi: अच्छे गुणों वाला श्रेष्ठ इन्सान
meaning_en: A superior person with good qualities.

name: Utteern
meaning: Intelligent and always successful in his work.
meaning_hi: अपने कार्य में सदा सफल रहने वाला, बुद्धिमान
meaning_en: Intelligent and always successful in his work.

name: Utsav
meaning: Hardworking and joyful.
meaning_hi: सबसे अधिक मेहनत करने वाले, आनंद में रहने वाले
meaning_en: Hardworking and joyful.

name: Utsuk
meaning: Curious to learn new knowledge and understand new things.
meaning_hi: किसी भी नया ज्ञान, पदार्थ को जानने की इच्छा रखने वाले, जिज्ञासु
meaning_en: Curious to learn new knowledge and understand new things.

name: Uday
meaning: Wise and progressing toward growth.
meaning_hi: उन्नति, प्रगति करने वाले, ज्ञानी
meaning_en: Wise and progressing toward growth.

name: Udayaveer
meaning: A wise, heroic, and progressive person who keeps moving toward advancement.
meaning_hi: ज्ञान से वीर बने हुए व्यक्ति, ज्ञानी महापुरुष, प्रगति उन्नति करने के लिए हमेशा आगे बढ़ने वाले, प्रगतिशील इन्सान
meaning_en: A wise, heroic, and progressive person who keeps moving toward advancement.

name: Udgeeth
meaning: A wise knower of the Sama Veda.
meaning_hi: सामवेद को जानने वाले, ज्ञानी
meaning_en: A wise knower of the Sama Veda.

name: Upendr
meaning: Supremely prosperous and powerful.
meaning_hi: परम् ऐश्वर्यशाली, सामर्थ्यवान
meaning_en: Supremely prosperous and powerful.

name: Umaakaant
meaning: A beloved devotee of Goddess Parvati, destined for fame.
meaning_hi: पार्वती जी के प्रिय भक्त, प्रसिद्धि पानेवाले
meaning_en: A beloved devotee of Goddess Parvati, destined for fame.

name: Umaashankar
meaning: One who gains fame and wishes good for everyone.
meaning_hi: प्रसिद्धि पा कर सबके भला चाहने वाला,
meaning_en: One who gains fame and wishes good for everyone.

name: Umesh
meaning: Powerful and patriotic, like Lord Shankar; a leader who earns fame and honor.
meaning_hi: यश, ख्याति, प्रसिद्धि आदि पाने वाले, शक्तिमान, राष्ट्र भक्त, सेना के लीडर, भगवान् शंकर के जैसे सामर्थ्यवान
meaning_en: Powerful and patriotic, like Lord Shankar; a leader who earns fame and honor.

name: Rigvid
meaning: A wise knower of the Rigveda.
meaning_hi: ऋग्वेद को जानने वाले, ज्ञानी बुद्धिमान
meaning_en: A wise knower of the Rigveda.

name: Ritik
meaning: A true-hearted person.
meaning_hi: सच्चे दिल वाले इन्सान
meaning_en: A true-hearted person.

name: Riten
meaning: A leader of true-hearted people.
meaning_hi: सच्चे दिल वाले लोगों के लीडर
meaning_en: A leader of true-hearted people.

name: Ribhu
meaning: One with divine qualities.
meaning_hi: दिव्य गुणों वाले
meaning_en: One with divine qualities.

name: Rishabh
meaning: Powerful, strong, and noble in conduct.
meaning_hi: श्रेष्ठ आचरण करने वाले, शक्तिशाली बलवान
meaning_en: Powerful, strong, and noble in conduct.

name: Rishi
meaning: Wise, meditative, charitable, and scientific.
meaning_hi: ज्ञानी,ध्यानी,परोपकारी,वैज्ञानिक
meaning_en: Wise, meditative, charitable, and scientific.

name: Rishik
meaning: Wise, meditative, charitable, and scientific.
meaning_hi: ज्ञानी,ध्यानी,परोपकारी,वैज्ञानिक
meaning_en: Wise, meditative, charitable, and scientific.

name: Rishidev
meaning: A disciple of wise, meditative, charitable, and scientific people.
meaning_hi: ज्ञानी,ध्यानी,परोपकारी, वैज्ञानिकों के शिष्य
meaning_en: A disciple of wise, meditative, charitable, and scientific people.

name: Rishipaal
meaning: A wise protector of sages.
meaning_hi: ऋषि की रक्षा करने वाले, ज्ञानी, बुद्धिमान
meaning_en: A wise protector of sages.

name: Rishimohan
meaning: A disciple of wise, meditative, charitable, and scientific people.
meaning_hi: ज्ञानी,ध्यानी,परोपकारी, वैज्ञानिकों के शिष्य
meaning_en: A disciple of wise, meditative, charitable, and scientific people.

name: Rishiraaj
meaning: Wise, meditative, charitable, and scientific.
meaning_hi: ज्ञानी,ध्यानी,परोपकारी,वैज्ञानिक
meaning_en: Wise, meditative, charitable, and scientific.

name: Rishir
meaning: Wise, meditative, charitable, and scientific.
meaning_hi: ज्ञानी,ध्यानी,परोपकारी,वैज्ञानिक
meaning_en: Wise, meditative, charitable, and scientific.

name: Risheesh
meaning: A disciple of wise, meditative, charitable, and scientific people.
meaning_hi: ज्ञानी,ध्यानी,परोपकारी, वैज्ञानिकों के शिष्य
meaning_en: A disciple of wise, meditative, charitable, and scientific people.

name: Ekakar
meaning: Eka dhyeya rakhane ekaagra mana.
meaning_hi: एक ध्येय रखने वाले, एकाग्र मन वाले
meaning_en: Eka dhyeya rakhane ekaagra mana.

name: Ekachar
meaning: Eka dhyeya rakhane ekaagra mana.
meaning_hi: एक ध्येय रखने वाले, एकाग्र मन वाले
meaning_en: Eka dhyeya rakhane ekaagra mana.

name: Ekadrig
meaning: Eka dhyeya rakhane ekaagra mana.
meaning_hi: एक ध्येय रखने वाले, एकाग्र मन वाले
meaning_en: Eka dhyeya rakhane ekaagra mana.

name: Ekadrishti
meaning: Eka dhyeya rakhane ekaagra mana.
meaning_hi: एक ध्येय रखने वाले, एकाग्र मन वाले
meaning_en: Eka dhyeya rakhane ekaagra mana.

name: Ekadhyey
meaning: Eka dhyeya rakhane ekaagra mana.
meaning_hi: एक ध्येय रखने वाले, एकाग्र मन वाले
meaning_en: Eka dhyeya rakhane ekaagra mana.

name: Ekanaath
meaning: Eka hee ishtadeva.
meaning_hi: एक ही इष्टदेव वाले
meaning_en: Eka hee ishtadeva.

name: Ekaraaj
meaning: Devotee of one supreme lord; faithful servant of God.
meaning_hi: एक स्वामी के भक्त, ईश्वर भक्त
meaning_en: Devotee of one supreme lord; faithful servant of God.

name: Ekarshi
meaning: A sage-like seeker devoted to one chosen ideal or knowledge.
meaning_hi: अपने इष्ट किसी एक ज्ञान को पाने वाले, ऋषि मुनि वैज्ञानिक जैसे
meaning_en: A sage-like seeker devoted to one chosen ideal or knowledge.

name: Ekaveer
meaning: A heroic devotee of one master, like a devotee of Hanuman.
meaning_hi: एक स्वामी के भक्त, ईश्वर भक्त , हनुमान भक्त
meaning_en: A heroic devotee of one master, like a devotee of Hanuman.

name: Ekavrat
meaning: Eka dhyeya rakhane ekaagra mana.

name: Vivek
meaning: One with special knowledge one who accurately knows right and wrong.
meaning_hi: विशेष ज्ञान वाला, सही ग़लत को ठीक ठीक जानने वाले
meaning_en: One with special knowledge one who accurately knows right and wrong.

name: Vishvanaath
meaning: sabase adhika saamarthya shaalee
meaning_hi: सबसे अधिक सामर्थ्य शाली
meaning_en: sabase adhika saamarthya shaalee

name: Vishvanaathan
meaning: sabase adhika saamarthya shaalee
meaning_hi: सबसे अधिक सामर्थ्य शाली
meaning_en: sabase adhika saamarthya shaalee

name: Vishvaamitr
meaning: Friend of all sabase milane.
meaning_hi: सबके मित्र, सबसे मिलने वाले
meaning_en: Friend of all sabase milane.

name: Vishvaas
meaning: Vishesha prana lene trusted by everyone.
meaning_hi: विशेष प्रण लेने वाले, सबके भरोसेमंद
meaning_en: Vishesha prana lene trusted by everyone.

name: Shankar
meaning: One who wishes welfare for everyone one who brings welfare to all giver of happiness.
meaning_hi: सबके कल्याण चाहने वाले, सबको कल्याण करने वाला, सुख देने वाले
meaning_en: One who wishes welfare for everyone one who brings welfare to all giver of happiness.

name: Shankesh
meaning: Curious by nature.
meaning_hi: जिज्ञासु स्वभाव वाला
meaning_en: Curious by nature.

name: Shaktidhar
meaning: shaktishaalee balavaan
meaning_hi: शक्तिशाली, बलवान
meaning_en: shaktishaalee balavaan

name: Shaktinandan
meaning: One who delights others through his strength shanvaan one who wishes welfare bhalaaee of chaahata rakhane.
meaning_hi: अपनी शक्ति से दूसरों को आनंदित करने वाले ,शंवान् कल्याण चाहने वाला, भलाई की चाहत रखने वाला
meaning_en: One who delights others through his strength shanvaan one who wishes welfare bhalaaee of chaahata rakhane.

name: Shataghn
meaning: Capable of defeating hundreds.
meaning_hi: सैकड़ों लोगों को पराजित करने का सामर्थ्य वाला
meaning_en: Capable of defeating hundreds.

name: Shatrunjay
meaning: Destroyer of enemiesveer.
meaning_hi: शत्रुओं को मटियामेट करने वाला,वीर
meaning_en: Destroyer of enemiesveer.

name: Shabdajny
meaning: Wise knower of word formation.
meaning_hi: शब्दों की रचना को जानकार, ज्ञानी
meaning_en: Wise knower of word formation.

name: Shashaank
meaning: Moon of samaana cool nature person helpful and social worker person.
meaning_hi: चंद्रमा के समान शीतल स्वभाव वाला व्यक्ति, परोपकारी और समाजसेवी व्यक्ति।
meaning_en: Moon of samaana cool nature person helpful and social worker person.

name: Shashee
meaning: Joyful, calm, and cool-natured like the moon.
meaning_hi: आनंद में रहने वाले, चंद्र के जैसे शान्त, शीतल स्वभाववाला
meaning_en: Joyful, calm, and cool-natured like the moon.

name: Shaandily
meaning: Son of a sage rishi muni of jaise of good conduct.
meaning_hi: ऋषि पुत्र, ऋषि मुनि के जैसे अच्छे आचरण वाला
meaning_en: Son of a sage rishi muni of jaise of good conduct.

name: Shaantanu
meaning: Beneficialone who guides for public welfare.
meaning_hi: कल्याणकारी,लोक हित,लाभदायक मार्गदर्शन करने वाले
meaning_en: Beneficialone who guides for public welfare.

name: Shaamak
meaning: Peaceful and gentle by nature vyaktione who calms others.
meaning_hi: शान्त,कोमल स्वभाव वाले व्यक्ति।दूसरों को शान्त कराने वाले।
meaning_en: Peaceful and gentle by nature vyaktione who calms others.

name: Shaarangg
meaning: Strong and powerful like an elephant.
meaning_hi: हाथी के जैसे बलवान, शक्तिमान
meaning_en: Strong and powerful like an elephant.

name: Shaarngg
meaning: One who reaches the goal like Lord Vishnu's bow.
meaning_hi: भगवान विष्णु के धनुष के जैसे लक्ष्य प्राप्ति करने वाले
meaning_en: One who reaches the goal like Lord Vishnu's bow.

name: Shekhar
meaning: One who holds the highest position like a crown highest and best person.
meaning_hi: मुकुट के समान सर्वोच्च पद पर रहने वाले, सर्वोच्च सर्वोत्तम इन्सान
meaning_en: One who holds the highest position like a crown highest and best person.

name: Shailendr
meaning: Steadfast like a mountain capable.
meaning_hi: पर्वत के समान अडिग रहने वाला, सामर्थ्यवान
meaning_en: Steadfast like a mountain capable.

name: Shyaamak
meaning: Wise and dynamicapane lakshya of praapti of liye always alertprosperous like a brother of the gods.
meaning_hi: ज्ञानी, गतिशील,अपने लक्ष्य की प्राप्ति के लिये सदैव जागरूक रहने वाला।देवताओं के भ्राता के समान ऐश्वर्यशाली
meaning_en: Wise and dynamicapane lakshya of praapti of liye always alertprosperous like a brother of the gods.

name: Shreejan
meaning: Friend of good people and well-wisher of all.
meaning_hi: अच्छे लोगों के मित्र, सबके हितैषी
meaning_en: Friend of good people and well-wisher of all.

name: Shreedhar
meaning: samriddha aishvaryashaalee bhaagyashaalee dhanavaana devee lakshmee kaa mahaana bhakta
meaning_hi: समृद्ध, ऐश्वर्यशाली, भाग्यशाली, धनवान, देवी लक्ष्मी का महान भक्त।
meaning_en: samriddha aishvaryashaalee bhaagyashaalee dhanavaana devee lakshmee kaa mahaana bhakta

name: Sanjay
meaning: One who achieves victory well one who wins with justice guide.
meaning_hi: अच्छी तरह से विजय प्राप्त करने वाला, न्याय के साथ विजय पानेवाला, मार्गदर्शक
meaning_en: One who achieves victory well one who wins with justice guide.

name: Sanjeev
meaning: One who lives well, fulfills duties sincerely, and carries radiant energy.
meaning_hi: अच्छी तरह से जीवन यापन करने वाले,अच्छे लक्ष्य को लेकर जीने की इच्छा करने वाला, अपने कर्तव्य को अच्छी तरह से निर्वहन करने वाला, ओजस्वी, तेजस्वी व्यक्ति।
meaning_en: One who lives well, fulfills duties sincerely, and carries radiant energy.

name: Sanvit
meaning: Wise, intelligent, and brilliantone who understands well good thinker and contemplative personknower and expert.
meaning_hi: ज्ञानी,बुद्धिमान,मेधावी,अच्छी तरह से जानने वाला, अच्छा विचारक,मननशील,ज्ञाता, विशेषज्ञ
meaning_en: Wise, intelligent, and brilliantone who understands well good thinker and contemplative personknower and expert.

name: Sanvid
meaning: Wise, intelligent, and brilliantone who understands well good thinker and contemplative personknower and expert.
meaning_hi: ज्ञानी,बुद्धिमान,मेधावी,अच्छी तरह से जानने वाला, अच्छा विचारक,मननशील,ज्ञाता, विशेषज्ञ
meaning_en: Wise, intelligent, and brilliantone who understands well good thinker and contemplative personknower and expert.

name: Sacheen
meaning: Leader of those who seek unity unity-loving milanasaar.
meaning_hi: एकता चाहने वालों के लीडर, एकता प्रिय, मिलनसार
meaning_en: Leader of those who seek unity unity-loving milanasaar.

name: Sajeev
meaning: One who lives with good purpose, fulfills duties sincerely, and carries radiant energy.
meaning_hi: अच्छे लक्ष्य को लेकर जीने की इच्छा करने वाला, अपने कर्तव्य को अच्छी तरह से निर्वहन करने वाला, ओजस्वी, तेजस्वी व्यक्ति।
meaning_en: One who lives with good purpose, fulfills duties sincerely, and carries radiant energy.

name: Sateesh
meaning: One who deeply loves his wife.
meaning_hi: धर्मपत्नी को बहुत ज्यादा प्रेम करने वाले
meaning_en: One who deeply loves his wife.

name: Sateeshachandr
meaning: One who deeply loves his wifesimple, peaceful, and joyful by nature.
meaning_hi: धर्मपत्नी को बहुत ज्यादा प्रेम करने वाले,सरल शान्त आनंदित स्वभाव वाले
meaning_en: One who deeply loves his wifesimple, peaceful, and joyful by nature.

name: Satnaam
meaning: One with a truthful name one who chants God's name.
meaning_hi: सत्य नाम वाले, भगवान् के नाम जप करने वाले
meaning_en: One with a truthful name one who chants God's name.

name: Satyendr
meaning: Lord of those who speak truth and justice.
meaning_hi: सत्य, उचित बोलने वाले के स्वामी
meaning_en: Lord of those who speak truth and justice.

name: Santosh
meaning: One who remains deeply content.
meaning_hi: अच्छी तरह से संतुष्ट रहने वाले
meaning_en: One who remains deeply content.

name: Sameer
meaning: Wise, one who gains good knowledge.
meaning_hi: अच्छा ज्ञान पाने वाला, ज्ञानी
meaning_en: Wise, one who gains good knowledge.

name: Sampoornaanand
meaning: Jisake paasa one with no lack of joy full of joy.
meaning_hi: जिसके पास आनंद की कोई कमी नहीं, पूर्ण आनंद वाले
meaning_en: Jisake paasa one with no lack of joy full of joy.

name: Samyag
meaning: Good person.
meaning_hi: अच्छा इंसान
meaning_en: Good person.

name: Sahadev
meaning: One who always remembers God.
meaning_hi: हर समय भगवान का सुमिरन करने वाला
meaning_en: One who always remembers God.

name: Saajan
meaning: One who lives among friends ekataa priy.
meaning_hi: मित्रों के साथ रहने वाला, एकता प्रिय
meaning_en: One who lives among friends ekataa priy.

name: Siddhaarth
meaning: One who strives to fulfill his purpose and goal yaa phira one whose purpose has been fulfilled aise hardworking and purposeful personone through whom people's purposes are fulfilled aise helpful person.
meaning_hi: जो अपने प्रयोजन(लक्ष्य) को सफल करने में लगा हो या फिर जिसका प्रयोजन सफल हो चुका हो ऐसे मेहनती,पुरुषार्थी व्यक्ति।जिससे लोगों का प्रयोजन सिद्ध होता हो ऐसे परोपकारी व्यक्ति।
meaning_en: One who strives to fulfill his purpose and goal yaa phira one whose purpose has been fulfilled aise hardworking and purposeful personone through whom people's purposes are fulfilled aise helpful person.

name: Seetaaraam
meaning: One who takes Lord Rama and Mother Sita as ideals one who behaves like them.
meaning_hi: मर्यादा पुरुषोत्तम भगवान राम और माता सीता को आदर्श मानने वाले, उनके जैसे आचरण करने वाले
meaning_en: One who takes Lord Rama and Mother Sita as ideals one who behaves like them.

name: Sutapaa
meaning: Wise ascetic.
meaning_hi: ज्ञानी, तपस्वी
meaning_en: Wise ascetic.

name: Sudarshan
meaning: Divyaone with a beautiful form.
meaning_hi: दिव्य,सुंदर स्वरूप वाले
meaning_en: Divyaone with a beautiful form.

name: Sudeep
meaning: One who comes into prominence positively wise.
meaning_hi: अच्छी तरह से सुर्खियों में आने वाले, ज्ञानी
meaning_en: One who comes into prominence positively wise.

name: Suneel
meaning: One who helps people achieve their goals well.
meaning_hi: अच्छी तरह से लोगों के लक्ष्य को हासिल कराने वाले
meaning_en: One who helps people achieve their goals well.

name: Subhaash
meaning: One who speaks sweetly.
meaning_hi: मधुर, मीठी मीठी बातें बोलने वाले
meaning_en: One who speaks sweetly.

name: Subhaashachandr
meaning: One who helps others with sweet speech and a calm, moon-like nature.
meaning_hi: मीठी बातें बोलते हुए परोपकार करने वाले,शीतल शान्त स्वभाववाला
meaning_en: One who helps others with sweet speech and a calm, moon-like nature.

name: Sumit
meaning: One who behaves with balance and measure.
meaning_hi: माप तौल कर व्यवहार करने वाले
meaning_en: One who behaves with balance and measure.

name: Suvaas
meaning: One with good dwelling places owner of grand homes.
meaning_hi: अच्छे निवास स्थान वाले, बड़े बड़े घरों वाला
meaning_en: One with good dwelling places owner of grand homes.

name: Srijan
meaning: Creator of new things inventive person.
meaning_hi: नये नये चीजें बनाने वाले, आविष्कार करने वाले
meaning_en: Creator of new things inventive person.

name: Somadev
meaning: Gentle-natured like the moon.
meaning_hi: चन्द्रमा के जैसे सौम्य स्वभाव वाले
meaning_en: Gentle-natured like the moon.

name: Somanaath
meaning: Leader of peace-loving people.
meaning_hi: शान्ति प्रिय समुदाय के लीडर
meaning_en: Leader of peace-loving people.

name: Somashekhar
meaning: Cool-headed peaceful by nature.
meaning_hi: ठंडा दिमाग़ वाले, शान्त स्वभाव वाला
meaning_en: Cool-headed peaceful by nature.

name: Saurabh
meaning: Apane famous through great deeds one whose deeds spread fragrance everywherefamous and renowned person.
meaning_hi: अपने विशेष महान् कर्म से विख्यात व्यक्ति। सुगन्ध के जैसे अपने कर्म से सब जगह महकने वाले,प्रसिद्ध ख्याति प्राप्त व्यक्ति।
meaning_en: Apane famous through great deeds one whose deeds spread fragrance everywherefamous and renowned person.

name: Hanumaan
meaning: Great and strong in build powerful like Hanuman, son of the wind.
meaning_hi: द ग्रेट खली के जैसे बड़ी ठोड़ी वाले, पवनसुत हनुमान के जैसे सामर्थ्यवान
meaning_en: Great and strong in build powerful like Hanuman, son of the wind.

name: Haradeep
meaning: Devotee of Lord Shiva one who spreads his name.
meaning_hi: भगवान शिव के भक्त, उनके नाम को फ़ैलाने वाले
meaning_en: Devotee of Lord Shiva one who spreads his name.

name: Harabhajan
meaning: One who sings praises of Lord Shankardevotee of God.
meaning_hi: शंकर भगवान के भजन करने वाले,प्रभु भक्त
meaning_en: One who sings praises of Lord Shankardevotee of God.

name: Hareen
meaning: Lord of lions.
meaning_hi: शेरों के मालिक
meaning_en: Lord of lions.

name: Hareesh
meaning: Devotee of Lord Vishnu person with a spirit of service.
meaning_hi: भगवान विष्णु के भक्त, सेवा भाव वाले इन्सान
meaning_en: Devotee of Lord Vishnu person with a spirit of service.

name: Harsh
meaning: khushamijaaja aadamee
meaning_hi: खुशमिजाज आदमी
meaning_en: khushamijaaja aadamee

name: Harshadeep
meaning: Khushamijaaja rahate hue one who makes everyone wise.
meaning_hi: खुशमिजाज रहते हुए सब को ज्ञानी बनाने वाले
meaning_en: Khushamijaaja rahate hue one who makes everyone wise.

name: Harshavardhan
meaning: One who increases people's happiness.
meaning_hi: लोगों की खुशी को बढ़ाने वाले
meaning_en: One who increases people's happiness.

name: Haveendr
meaning: Bahuta from owner of excellent things.
meaning_hi: बहुत से उत्तम पदार्थों के मालिक
meaning_en: Bahuta from owner of excellent things.

name: Haardik
meaning: One who follows the heartone who listens to the heart.
meaning_hi: हृदय अनुकूल चलने वाले,मन की सुनने वाले
meaning_en: One who follows the heartone who listens to the heart.

name: Hitaanand
meaning: One whose joy lies in helping people vaha social worker.
meaning_hi: लोगों के हित करना ही जिसके लिए आनंद है वह, समाजसेवी
meaning_en: One whose joy lies in helping people vaha social worker.

name: Hitesh
meaning: Well-wisher of everyone leader of helpful people.
meaning_hi: सबके हित चाहने वाला, परोपकारी लोगों के लीडर
meaning_en: Well-wisher of everyone leader of helpful people.

name: Hriday
meaning: One inclined to give, receive, and exchange things.
meaning_hi: पदार्थ ले जाने,ले आने और देने के स्वभाव वाला
meaning_en: One inclined to give, receive, and exchange things.

name: Hrideesh
meaning: One who follows the heart.
meaning_hi: हृदय अनुकूल चलने वाले
meaning_en: One who follows the heart.

name: Hemant
meaning: Cool-minded like the winter season.
meaning_hi: शीत ऋतु के जैसे ठंडे दिमाग वाले
meaning_en: Cool-minded like the winter season.

name: Hemaraaj
meaning: Bahuta from owner of wealth and resources.
meaning_hi: बहुत से संपत्तियों के मालिक
meaning_en: Bahuta from owner of wealth and resources.
